creator: scheidell@FreeBSD.org
text:
On 12/31/11 3:50 PM, Jaap Boender wrote:
>

> Not quite, 163717 is a patch to ocaml-react that keeps ocaml-lwt from 
> compiling (it's a dependency). So the patch 163717 should be applied 
> to devel/ocaml-react, whereas 163276 is an upgrade for devel/ocaml-lwt.

ok, so if I commit 163717, the miwi can complete 163276, right?



> Sorry for the confusion,
>
>   Jaap
